description: Instant responses from HuggingFace's tiny model. Only 1.8GB for basic tasks.
fullDescription:
## MODEL OVERVIEW
SmolLM2 is HuggingFace's compact language model family designed for instant responses and on-device deployment. The 1.7B variant provides useful AI assistance with near-zero latency and tool calling support.

## Key Features
- **Instant Responses**: Near-zero latency for real-time interaction
- **Ultra-Compact**: Only 1.8GB on disk
- **Tool Calling**: Native tool/function calling support
- **Low Resources**: Runs on minimal hardware
- **On-Device**: Lightweight enough to run on-device

## Specifications
- Parameters: 1.7B
- Context Length: 8K tokens
- Default Size: ~1.8GB (Q8_0)
- Architecture: Dense transformer

## Use Cases
- Quick Q&A
- Simple text generation with tool use
- Edge and on-device deployment
- Prototyping and testing
- Ultra-low-resource environments
modelReadme: SmolLM2 is a family of compact language models available in three sizes: 135M, 360M, and 1.7B parameters. They are capable of solving a wide range of tasks while being lightweight enough to run on-device.
name: smollm2-17b
title: SmolLM2 1.7B
